Software/Workflow

MACEFlow

Utilities and command-line workflows for preparing training data and running MACE-powered molecular dynamics. Helps to implement active learning for MLIP training.

Python HPC workflows Active learning ML potentials training Model validation Data automation MD simulations
GitHub

GO-suite

Preparation and analysis of Graphene Oxide-asphaltene system for adsorption and aggregation study

Python PMF calculations RDF Density profiles LAMMPS input generation Force-field parameterization 2D Heatmaps Trajectory analysis Orientation analysis Pymol UMA
GitHub

PotAudit

MLIP (including foundational model) validation using VASP and ASE

Python VASP workflow automation DFT validation MLIP benchmarking UMA annotation Single-point calculations Energy/force comparison Dataset curation ASE POTCAR generation
GitHub
